tEn: TransMamba: A Sequence-Level Hybrid Transformer-Mamba Language Model
tZh: TransMamba：一种序列级混合Transformer-Mamba语言模型
sEn: TransMamba dynamically switches between attention and SSM mechanisms at different token lengths and layers via shared parameter matrices, achieving superior efficiency and performance.
sZh: TransMamba通过共享参数矩阵在不同token长度和层上动态切换注意力与SSM机制，实现了更优的效率与性能。
absEn: Transformers are the cornerstone of modern large language models, but their quadratic computational complexity limits efficiency in long-sequence processing. Recent advancements in Mamba, a state space model (SSM) with linear complexity, offer promising efficiency gains but suffer from unstable contextual learning and multitask generalization. Some works conduct layer-level hybrid structures that combine Transformer and Mamba layers, aiming to make full use of both advantages. This paper proposes TransMamba, a novel sequence-level hybrid framework that unifies Transformer and Mamba through shared parameter matrices (QKV and CBx), and thus could dynamically switch between attention and SSM mechanisms at different token lengths and layers. We design the Memory Converter to bridge Transformer and Mamba by converting attention outputs into SSM-compatible states, ensuring seamless information flow at TransPoints where the transformation happens. The TransPoint scheduling is also thoroughly explored for balancing effectiveness and efficiency. We conducted extensive experiments demonstrating that TransMamba achieves superior training efficiency and performance compared to single and hybrid baselines, and validated the deeper consistency between Transformer and Mamba paradigms at sequence level, offering a scalable solution for next-generation language modeling. Code and data are available at https://github.com/Yixing-Li/TransMamba
absZh: Transformer是现代大型语言模型的基石，但其二次计算复杂度限制了长序列处理的效率。最近Mamba（一种具有线性复杂度的状态空间模型）的进展提供了有前景的效率提升，但存在上下文学习不稳定和多任务泛化能力差的问题。一些工作采用层级混合结构，结合Transformer和Mamba层，旨在充分利用两者的优势。本文提出TransMamba，一种新颖的序列级混合框架，通过共享参数矩阵（QKV和CBx）统一Transformer和Mamba，从而能在不同token长度和层上动态切换注意力与SSM机制。我们设计了Memory Converter，通过将注意力输出转换为SSM兼容状态来桥接Transformer和Mamba，确保在转换发生的TransPoint处信息流无缝衔接。还深入探索了TransPoint调度以平衡效果与效率。大量实验表明，与单一和混合基线相比，TransMamba实现了更优的训练效率和性能，并在序列级验证了Transformer与Mamba范式之间更深层的一致性，为下一代语言建模提供了可扩展的解决方案。代码和数据见https://github.com/Yixing-Li/TransMamba。

contrib.en: Proposes TransMamba, a sequence-level hybrid framework unifying Transformer and Mamba via shared QKV and CBx parameters.
contrib.zh: 提出 TransMamba，一种通过共享 QKV 和 CBx 参数在序列级别统一 Transformer 和 Mamba 的混合框架。

contrib.en: Designs Memory Converter for lossless information transfer from attention to SSM at TransPoints.
contrib.zh: 设计记忆转换器，在转换点实现从注意力机制到 SSM 的无损信息传递。

contrib.en: Explores TransPoint scheduling to balance effectiveness and efficiency across layers and token lengths.
contrib.zh: 探索转换点调度策略，以平衡不同层和词元长度下的效果与效率。

contrib.en: Demonstrates superior training efficiency and performance over Transformer, Mamba, and hybrid baselines.
contrib.zh: 在训练效率和性能上优于 Transformer、Mamba 及混合基线模型。

contrib.en: Validates deeper consistency between Transformer and Mamba paradigms at the sequence level.
contrib.zh: 验证了 Transformer 与 Mamba 范式在序列级别更深层次的一致性。

contrib.en: Provides a scalable solution for next-generation language modeling with flexible structure switching.
contrib.zh: 为下一代语言建模提供可扩展的解决方案，支持灵活的结构切换。

limits.en: TransMamba's efficiency gain is limited by engineering optimizations; theoretical speedup not fully realized.
limits.zh: TransMamba 的效率提升受工程优化限制，理论加速未完全实现。

limits.en: TransPoint scheduling requires careful tuning; suboptimal schedules degrade performance.
limits.zh: 转换点调度需要仔细调优，次优调度会降低性能。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to 8 English tasks; generalization to other languages and domains not verified.
limits.zh: 评估仅限于 8 个英文任务，未验证对其他语言和领域的泛化能力。

limits.en: Model size and training data scale are moderate; scalability to larger models and datasets not explored.
limits.zh: 模型规模和训练数据量适中，未探索向更大模型和数据集的扩展性。

limits.en: Memory Converter assumes theoretical losslessness; practical numerical precision issues may arise.
limits.zh: 记忆转换器假设理论无损，实际中可能存在数值精度问题。

items.en: Transformers are the cornerstone of modern large language models, but their quadratic computational complexity limits efficiency in long-sequence processing. Recent advancements in Mamba, a state space model (SSM) with linear complexity, offer promising efficiency gains but suffer from unstable contextual learning and multitask generalization. This paper proposes TransMamba, a novel framework that unifies Transformer and Mamba through shared parameter matrices (e.g., QKV and CBx), and thus could dynamically switch between attention and SSM mechanisms at different token lengths and layers. We design the Memory converter to bridge Transformer and Mamba by converting attention outputs into SSM-compatible states, ensuring seamless information flow at TransPoints where the transformation happens. The TransPoint scheduling is also thoroughly explored for further improvements. We conducted extensive experiments demonstrating that TransMamba achieves superior training efficiency and performance compared to baselines, and validated the deeper consistency between Transformer and Mamba paradigms, offering a scalable solution for next-generation sequence modeling.
items.zh: Transformer是现代大型语言模型的基石，但其二次计算复杂度限制了长序列处理的效率。最近，Mamba（一种具有线性复杂度的状态空间模型）的进展提供了有前景的效率提升，但存在上下文学习和多任务泛化不稳定的问题。本文提出TransMamba，一种通过共享参数矩阵（如QKV和CBx）统一Transformer和Mamba的新框架，从而能够在不同token长度和层之间动态切换注意力机制和SSM机制。我们设计了Memory Converter来桥接Transformer和Mamba，通过将注意力输出转换为SSM兼容的状态，确保在转换发生的TransPoints处信息无缝流动。还深入探讨了TransPoint调度以进一步改进。我们进行了大量实验，证明TransMamba在训练效率和性能上优于基线，并验证了Transformer和Mamba范式之间更深层次的一致性，为下一代序列建模提供了可扩展的解决方案。

items.en: Transformers (Vaswani et al., 2017; Achiam et al., 2023; Touvron et al., 2023) are the foundation and mainstream model of modern deep learning (Zhao et al., 2023), showing dominating power in language modeling. Recently, Mamba has emerged (Gu & Dao, 2023) and been verified in various fields. Compared with Transformer, Mamba has linear computational complexity, high efficiency in processing long sequences, and lower training and inference costs (Qu et al., 2024). Nevertheless, its contextual learning and multi-task generalization capabilities are unstable (Waleffe et al., 2024). Transformer and Mamba have their own strengths and complement each other.
items.zh: Transformer（Vaswani et al., 2017; Achiam et al., 2023; Touvron et al., 2023）是现代深度学习的基础和主流模型（Zhao et al., 2023），在语言建模中展现出主导力量。最近，Mamba出现（Gu & Dao, 2023）并在各个领域得到验证。与Transformer相比，Mamba具有线性计算复杂度、处理长序列的高效率以及更低的训练和推理成本（Qu et al., 2024）。然而，其上下文学习和多任务泛化能力不稳定（Waleffe et al., 2024）。Transformer和Mamba各有优势，相互补充。

items.en: However, Transformer and Mamba have their own flaws that cannot be addressed by naive layer-shared hybrid structures (Yuan et al., 2024; Yang et al., 2024). For example, Transformer has faster training for short contexts while Mamba has better efficiency in longer contexts (see Table 2). Moreover, the naive static hybrid model has structural restrictions such as the order of Mamba and Transformer, mandatory ratios, etc (Lieber et al., 2024; Dao & Gu, 2024). The performance of the Hybrid model will deteriorate if these specific rules are not met, which greatly limits the exploration and breakthrough of the model.
items.zh: 然而，Transformer和Mamba各自存在缺陷，无法通过简单的层共享混合结构解决（Yuan et al., 2024; Yang et al., 2024）。例如，Transformer在短上下文中训练更快，而Mamba在长上下文中效率更高（见表2）。此外，简单的静态混合模型存在结构限制，如Mamba和Transformer的顺序、强制比例等（Lieber et al., 2024; Dao & Gu, 2024）。如果不满足这些特定规则，混合模型的性能会下降，这极大地限制了模型的探索和突破。

items.en: Recently, Mamba2 (Dao & Gu, 2024) further enhances the performance of Mamba series, which reveals the surprising consistency of the attention of Transformer and the State Space Model (SSM) of Mamba. Furthermore, (Wang et al., 2024) performed distillation between Mamba and Transformer, distilling the QKV parameters of Attention to obtain CBx of SSM, verifying that the parameters can be interactively transferred as shown in Table 2. These motivate us that we can bravely utilize a set of shared parameters of QKV and CBx to build a joint Transformer-Mamba framework, which could flexibly decide which structure is suitable for the current training/inference in different layers/token lengths, taking advantage of both structures to balance effectiveness and efficiency while ensuring structural flexibility. Intuitively, to obtain the efficiency advantages of both structures, we can make the model adopt the Transformer mechanism for training on relatively short contexts and the SSM mechanism on long contexts. As shown in Figure 3, such prototype framework has only one set of parameters to flexibly switch between Transformer and Mamba for LM. In the first N tokens of the sequence, the parameter matrix is calculated using the attention mechanism. At a specific node in the sequence (which we call TransPoints from Transformer mode to Mamba2 mode), the parameter matrix is converted to the SSM mechanism for subsequent sequence generation, so as to achieve better training efficiency with better performance in sequences of different lengths.
items.zh: 最近，Mamba2（Dao & Gu, 2024）进一步提升了Mamba系列的性能，揭示了Transformer的注意力机制与Mamba的状态空间模型之间惊人的一致性。此外，（Wang et al., 2024）在Mamba和Transformer之间进行了蒸馏，将Attention的QKV参数蒸馏得到SSM的CBx，验证了参数可以交互转移，如表2所示。这些启发我们可以大胆地利用一组共享的QKV和CBx参数构建一个联合的Transformer-Mamba框架，该框架能够灵活地决定在不同层/不同token长度下哪种结构适合当前训练/推理，从而兼顾两种结构的优势以平衡效果和效率，同时确保结构灵活性。直观上，为了获得两种结构的效率优势，我们可以让模型在相对较短的上下文中采用Transformer机制进行训练，在长上下文中采用SSM机制。如图3所示，这样的原型框架只有一组参数，可以灵活地在Transformer和Mamba之间切换用于语言模型。在序列的前N个token中，使用注意力机制计算参数矩阵。在序列中的特定节点（我们称之为从Transformer模式到Mamba2模式的TransPoints），参数矩阵转换为SSM机制用于后续序列生成，从而在不同长度的序列中实现更好的训练效率和性能。

items.capEn: Figure 1: TransMamba has shared parameters to flexibly switch between Attention and SSM, and TransPoints decide which parts of token sequence use Attention or SSM.
items.capZh: 图1：TransMamba具有共享参数，可灵活在Attention和SSM之间切换，TransPoints决定token序列的哪些部分使用Attention或SSM。

items.capEn: Figure 2: TransMamba generally shows better efficiency and performance with different sizes.
items.capZh: 图2：TransMamba在不同规模下通常表现出更好的效率和性能。

items.en: The implementation of this flexible token-level Transformer-Mamba transformation is non-trivial and has the following challenges: (1) In the TransPoints between, the latter structure (Mamba) should well capture the information of the previous tokens learned by the former structure (Transformer) via an appropriate method that the latter structure could understand. How to losslessly transfer the knowledge learned by the previous Transformer to the latter SSM modeling part is essential. (2) We could flexibly decide when (e.g., at what sequence length) to transfer from Transformer to Mamba at different layers in such framework. Jointly considering effectiveness and efficiency, the selection of a reasonable set of TransPoints requires careful explorations under insightful principles. (3) The structures of this framework varies at different sequence lengths (e.g., pure Transformer/Mamba2 or certain Hybrid structures), in which case the model performance should be concerned.
items.zh: 这种灵活的token级Transformer-Mamba转换的实现并非易事，存在以下挑战：（1）在TransPoints之间，后一种结构（Mamba）应通过适当的方法很好地捕捉前一种结构（Transformer）学到的先前token信息，以便后一种结构能够理解。如何无损地将先前Transformer学到的知识传递给后续的SSM建模部分至关重要。（2）我们可以灵活决定在此类框架的不同层中何时（例如，在什么序列长度）从Transformer转换到Mamba。综合考虑效果和效率，选择一组合理的TransPoints需要在有洞察力的原则下进行仔细探索。（3）该框架的结构在不同序列长度下会变化（例如，纯Transformer/Mamba2或某些混合结构），在这种情况下，模型性能应受到关注。

items.en: To address these problems, we propose a novel TransMamba framework that utilizes the same set of shared parameters to flexibly switch between attention and SSM mechanisms in token generation at different sequence lengths and layers, combining the advantages in effectiveness and efficiency of Transformer and Mamba. Specifically, we design a sophisticated Memory Converter to convert the intermediate results of the attention part into the state required by the SSM mechanism, ensuring the consistency of the information around the TransPoint with tokens being processed, and no loss will be incurred when converting between attention and SSM. Moreover, we have conducted comprehensive research on the TransPoint schedule, exploring the overall optimal TransPoint setting and insights in different layers and sequence lengths. In this case, our TransMamba framework could be viewed as a flexible dynamic combination of hybrid Transformer/Mamba layers varies in different token lengths. Our contributions are summarized as follows:
items.zh: 为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的TransMamba框架，该框架利用同一组共享参数，在不同序列长度和层的token生成中灵活切换注意力机制和SSM机制，结合了Transformer和Mamba在效果和效率上的优势。具体来说，我们设计了一个精密的Memory Converter，将注意力部分的中间结果转换为SSM机制所需的状态，确保TransPoint附近信息的一致性，并且注意力与SSM之间的转换不会产生损失。此外，我们对TransPoint调度进行了全面研究，探索了不同层和序列长度下的整体最优TransPoint设置和见解。在这种情况下，我们的TransMamba框架可以被视为一个灵活的动态组合，由不同token长度下变化的混合Transformer/Mamba层组成。我们的贡献总结如下：

items.en: We propose a novel TransMamba framework, which verifies the consistency of Transformer and Mamba in a deeper degree, starting from the one shared set of parameters while outputting tokens via two different mechanisms.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的TransMamba框架，从一组共享参数出发，通过两种不同机制输出token，在更深层次上验证了Transformer和Mamba的一致性。

items.en: We design the Memory Converter that conforms to the theoretical solution to ensure the consistency of information in TransMamba during the conversion process, and explore the optimal TransPoint schedule at different layers and token lengths.
items.zh: 我们设计了符合理论解的Memory Converter，确保TransMamba在转换过程中的信息一致性，并探索了不同层和token长度下的最优TransPoint调度。

items.en: We conduct extensive experiments to verify the performance and efficiency advantages of TransMamba on both effectiveness and efficiency. In conclusion, TransMamba could be a promising structure for LM.
items.zh: 我们进行了大量实验，验证了TransMamba在效果和效率上的性能和效率优势。总之，TransMamba有望成为语言模型的一种有前途的结构。

items.capEn: Figure 3: (a) Structure of TransMamba. Attention and SSM have shared parameters 𝐖𝐐𝐊𝐕\mathbf{W_{QKV}} and 𝐖𝐂𝐁𝐱\mathbf{W_{CBx}}. Tokens are either processed via the green path (SSM mode) or the blue path (Attention mode). (b) Memory Converter. (c) The TransPoint Scheduling of TransMamba.
items.capZh: 图3：（a）TransMamba的结构。Attention和SSM共享参数𝐖𝐐𝐊𝐕和𝐖𝐂𝐁𝐱。token要么通过绿色路径（SSM模式）处理，要么通过蓝色路径（Attention模式）处理。（b）Memory Converter。（c）TransMamba的TransPoint调度。

items.en: We use the classic notation from the Transformer and Mamba papers. 𝐐𝐊𝐕\mathbf{QKV} denotes the key parameters (query, key, value) of Attention, and 𝐋\mathbf{L} denotes the additional mask matrix. 𝐂𝐁𝐱\mathbf{CBx} represents the key parameters in the SSM, Δ\Delta is used to control the discrete step size in SSM, and 𝐀\mathbf{A} is used to describe the global dependencies of the hidden state, which is similar to the mask matrix in Attention (Gu & Dao, 2023). In order to satisfy the classic symbolic representation and clear expression, we use 𝐇\mathbf{H} to denote the input embeddings for attention and SSM. The corresponding calculations are shown in Table 2.
items.zh: 我们使用Transformer和Mamba论文中的经典符号。𝐐𝐊𝐕表示Attention的关键参数（查询、键、值），𝐋表示额外的掩码矩阵。𝐂𝐁𝐱表示SSM中的关键参数，Δ用于控制SSM中的离散步长，𝐀用于描述隐藏状态的全局依赖关系，类似于Attention中的掩码矩阵（Gu & Dao, 2023）。为了满足经典符号表示和清晰表达，我们使用𝐇表示注意力和SSM的输入嵌入。相应的计算如表2所示。

items.en: Mamba2 (Dao & Gu, 2024) compares the underlying mechanisms of Transformer and Mamba, and introduces the dual form of SSM to illustrate the consistency between the two. In Table 2, we can find that the core mechanisms of Transformer and Mamba (attention and SSM) are completely symmetrical. Wang et al. (2024) aligned the QKV of the transformer weights with CBx of Mamba and performed distillation, achieving improved results on chat and long-text benchmarks. This once again shows that the core weights of Transformer and Mamba are transferable and unified. The above theories and research inspired us to build a bolder framework of TransMamba with a unified architecture of Transformer and Mamba.
items.zh: Mamba2（Dao & Gu, 2024）比较了Transformer和Mamba的底层机制，并引入了SSM的对偶形式来说明两者之间的一致性。在表2中，我们可以发现Transformer和Mamba的核心机制（注意力和SSM）是完全对称的。Wang等人（2024）将Transformer权重的QKV与Mamba的CBx对齐并进行蒸馏，在聊天和长文本基准上取得了改进的结果。这再次表明Transformer和Mamba的核心权重是可转移和统一的。上述理论和研究启发我们构建一个更大胆的TransMamba框架，该框架具有Transformer和Mamba的统一架构。

items.en: As shown in Table 2, recent work (Dao & Gu, 2024) theoretically summarizes the FLOPs of Attention and SSM. T\mathrm{T} denotes the sequence length, N\mathrm{N} denotes the state dimension and P\mathrm{P} denotes the TransPoint value. When T is greater than N, Transformer has an advantage in efficiency on shorter sequences, while Mamba is efficient at training on long sequences due to its linear complexity of T. This advantage of Mamba’s training efficiency on longer contexts is present with most of the commonly-used model sizes, which also forms the motivation of our TransMamba that attempts to unleash the maximum potential of the flexible hybrid Transformer-Mamba structure in terms of effectiveness and efficiency.
items.zh: 如表2所示，最近的工作（Dao & Gu, 2024）从理论上总结了Attention和SSM的FLOPs。T表示序列长度，N表示状态维度，P表示TransPoint值。当T大于N时，Transformer在较短序列上具有效率优势，而Mamba由于T的线性复杂度，在长序列训练上高效。Mamba在较长上下文上的训练效率优势在大多数常用模型规模下都存在，这也构成了我们TransMamba的动机，即尝试在效果和效率方面释放灵活混合Transformer-Mamba结构的最大潜力。

items.en: Main architecture. As shown in Figure 3 (a), TransMamba is a layer-stacked Decoder-only autoregressive model. Each layer of TransMamba contains all the parameters of Mamba, including the parameters required to calculate C, B, x, A and Δ\Delta. Based on the aforementioned consistency between Transformer and Mamba, we boldly let QKV and CBx share the same parameters (i.e., Q↔\leftrightarrowC, K↔\leftrightarrowB, V↔\leftrightarrowx). In other words, our model has the ability to switch between Transformer and Mamba structures, but with only one set of parameters.
items.zh: 主要架构。如图3（a）所示，TransMamba是一个层堆叠的仅解码器自回归模型。TransMamba的每一层都包含Mamba的所有参数，包括计算C、B、x、A和Δ所需的参数。基于上述Transformer和Mamba之间的一致性，我们大胆地让QKV和CBx共享相同的参数（即Q↔C，K↔B，V↔x）。换句话说，我们的模型具有在Transformer和Mamba结构之间切换的能力，但只有一组参数。

items.en: In addition, TransMamba contains the crucial Memory Converter used for lossless information conversion when model parameters are switched from QKV to CBx (in Section 2.3), armed with our TransPoint schedule that decides whether we should use Attention mode or SSM mode at a certain layer or token length (in Section 2.4). To ensure better training efficiency, we only set a single TransPoint (i.e., the token position where the switch from Attention to SSM or vice versa happens) for each layer. The sequence before the TransPoint is calculated using Attention, and the rest is calculated through SSM. Complex structures with multiple TransPoints may have more magical properties and effects, which can be provided for future research. At different token lengths, TransMamba could be flexibly regarded as different structures (e.g., pure Transformer, Mamba, or Hybrid Transformer-Mamba).
items.zh: 此外，TransMamba包含关键的Memory Converter，用于在模型参数从QKV切换到CBx时进行无损信息转换（见第2.3节），并结合我们的TransPoint调度，决定在特定层或token长度下应使用Attention模式还是SSM模式（见第2.4节）。为了确保更好的训练效率，我们为每一层只设置一个TransPoint（即从Attention切换到SSM或反之的token位置）。TransPoint之前的序列使用Attention计算，其余部分通过SSM计算。具有多个TransPoint的复杂结构可能具有更神奇的特性和效果，可供未来研究。在不同token长度下，TransMamba可以灵活地视为不同的结构（例如，纯Transformer、Mamba或混合Transformer-Mamba）。

items.en: Formalized calculation process. We denote the hidden state of the input tokens as 𝐡\mathbf{h}. The remaining critical mathematical symbols are the same as given in Section 2.1.1. TransMamba calculates intermediate results through linear project and convolution modules. Since the parts of the input token sequence that are shorter and longer than the TransPoint will be calculated through different mechanisms, for the sake of clarity, we use different symbols to represent the two parts: (a) For the relatively former part of the input before TransPoint:
items.zh: 形式化计算过程。我们将输入token的隐藏状态表示为𝐡。其余关键数学符号与第2.1.1节中给出的相同。TransMamba通过线性投影和卷积模块计算中间结果。由于输入token序列中短于和长于TransPoint的部分将通过不同机制计算，为清晰起见，我们使用不同符号表示这两部分：（a）对于TransPoint之前的输入前部：

items.en: The output 𝐲𝐬\mathbf{y_{s}} will be calculated through the attention mechanism before TransPoint:
items.zh: 输出𝐲𝐬将在TransPoint之前通过注意力机制计算：

items.en: (b) For the relatively latter part of the input after TransPoint:
items.zh: （b）对于TransPoint之后的输入后部：

items.en: TransMamba utilizes the SSM mechanism to generate outputs 𝐲𝐥\mathbf{y_{l}} after TransPoint. The initial state h0h_{0} will be obtained through the Memory Converter:
items.zh: TransMamba在TransPoint之后利用SSM机制生成输出𝐲𝐥。初始状态h0将通过Memory Converter获得：

items.en: The final output of our TransMamba can be expressed as the combination of 𝐲𝐬,𝐲𝐥\mathbf{y_{s}},\mathbf{y_{l}}:
items.zh: 我们的TransMamba的最终输出可以表示为𝐲𝐬,𝐲𝐥的组合：

items.en: Feasibility. The feasibility of our design comes from two key points: (1) Due to the consistency of the attention and SSM mechanisms described in Section 2.1.1, the output of TransMamba can be calculated either through the attention or SSM mechanism flexibly. (2) Due to the power of our memory converter, TransMamba does not lose any information when converting from attention to SSM as the token length increases across the TransPoint. The sequence state required by SSM can be perfectly preserved by the 𝐊\mathbf{K} and 𝐕\mathbf{V} of attention.
items.zh: 可行性。我们设计的可行性来自两个关键点：(1) 由于第2.1.1节所述的注意力机制和SSM机制的一致性，TransMamba的输出可以灵活地通过注意力机制或SSM机制计算。(2) 由于我们的Memory Converter的强大能力，当token长度在TransPoint处增加时，TransMamba在从注意力机制转换到SSM时不会丢失任何信息。SSM所需的序列状态可以被注意力机制的𝐊和𝐕完美保留。

items.en: The memory converter is aimed to losslessly convert 𝐊\mathbf{K} and 𝐕\mathbf{V} calculated before TransPoint into the hidden state 𝐡\mathbf{h} required for the Mamba mode after TransPoint. First, we expand the mathematical form of SSM in detail:
items.zh: Memory Converter旨在将TransPoint之前计算的𝐊和𝐕无损转换为TransPoint之后Mamba模式所需的隐藏状态𝐡。首先，我们详细展开SSM的数学形式：

items.en: where 𝐀×\mathbf{A}^{\times} is the lower triangular matrix obtained by arranging the elements of 𝐀¯\overline{\mathbf{A}}, and details are shown in Appendix A.2.1. Based on the consistency of the mathematical structure of attention and SSM shown in Section 2.1.1, we can calculate the estimated hidden state from the intermediate results K, V of attention as follows:
items.zh: 其中𝐀×是通过排列𝐀¯的元素得到的下三角矩阵，详见附录A.2.1。基于第2.1.1节所示的注意力机制和SSM数学结构的一致性，我们可以从注意力机制的中间结果K、V计算估计的隐藏状态如下：

items.en: The initial state of the TransPoint can be obtained as h0=hs​[−1]h_{0}=h_{s}[-1]. Therefore, TransMamba can transform losslessly from attention to SSM during sequence generation. It should be noted that our Memory converter does not require additional parameters, but is a theoretical solution calculated from existing results.
items.zh: TransPoint的初始状态可以表示为h0=hs[-1]。因此，TransMamba可以在序列生成过程中从注意力机制无损转换到SSM。需要注意的是，我们的Memory Converter不需要额外参数，而是从现有结果计算得出的理论解决方案。

items.en: TransPoint represents the token position of the segmentation of the sequence where the Transformer→\rightarrowMamba mode switch happens via the above Memory converter for each layer. The position of TransPoint in the sequence can control the ratio of attention and SSM in this layer of TransMamba. For example, when TransPoint is set to the midpoint of the sequence, this layer is a 1:1 combination of Transformer and Mamba in the sequence level; if it is set to the beginning of the sequence, this layer is equal to Mamba. The TransPoint schedule decides the functional (hybrid) structure of TransMamba at different token lengths.
items.zh: TransPoint表示序列分割的token位置，在该位置通过上述Memory Converter对每一层进行Transformer→Mamba模式切换。序列中TransPoint的位置可以控制TransMamba该层中注意力机制和SSM的比例。例如，当TransPoint设置在序列中点时，该层在序列级别上是Transformer和Mamba的1:1组合；如果设置在序列开头，则该层等同于Mamba。TransPoint调度决定了TransMamba在不同token长度下的功能（混合）结构。

items.en: The TransPoint Scheduling aims to to maximize the respective advantages of Attention and SSM in short and long context training to optimize the overall efficiency and performance. In summary, TransPoint scheduling should meet the following requirements:
items.zh: TransPoint调度旨在最大化注意力机制和SSM在短上下文和长上下文训练中的各自优势，以优化整体效率和性能。总之，TransPoint调度应满足以下要求：

items.en: TransPoint has a great impact on training time. The distribution of TransPoints can be closer to the optimal position in Table 2 for better training efficiency;
items.zh: TransPoint对训练时间有很大影响。TransPoint的分布可以更接近表2中的最优位置，以获得更好的训练效率；

items.en: TransPoints at different layers cannot be too concentrated at one position. Under the premise of the first point, it needs to be distributed over the entire length of the sequence to prevent possible degradation brought by the mutations of simultaneous Transformer-to-Mamba transformations for better effectiveness;
items.zh: 不同层的TransPoint不能过于集中在一个位置。在第一点的前提下，TransPoint需要分布在整个序列长度上，以防止同时进行Transformer到Mamba转换带来的可能退化，以获得更好的效果；

items.en: Due to the asynchronous transformations, our TransMamba could be viewed as different hybrid Transformer-Mamba structures at different token lengths. Therefore, we should take fully advantages of the superior hybrid Transformer-Mamba structures’ insights to further enhance the effectiveness.
items.zh: 由于异步转换，我们的TransMamba在不同token长度下可被视为不同的混合Transformer-Mamba结构。因此，我们应充分利用优越的混合Transformer-Mamba结构的见解，以进一步增强效果。

items.en: TransPoint schedule from token length aspect. Due to the flexibility of TransPoint scheduling at different layers and token lengths, the model structure of TransMamba varies at different positions. Suppose the number of layers of the model is L{L} and the length of the sequence is T{T}, there are L∗T{L}*{T} possible TransPoint schedules for our TransMamba with fixed parameters. We denote the value of TransPoint as P{P} (indicating that the tokens before position P{P} are modeled via Transformer and those after P{P} are encoded via Mamba), and we have the FLOPs for a TransMamba layer as follows:
items.zh: 从token长度角度的TransPoint调度。由于不同层和token长度下TransPoint调度的灵活性，TransMamba的模型结构在不同位置有所不同。假设模型层数为L，序列长度为T，则固定参数下我们的TransMamba有L*T种可能的TransPoint调度。我们将TransPoint的值记为P（表示位置P之前的token通过Transformer建模，之后的通过Mamba编码），则TransMamba层的FLOPs如下：

items.en: Theoretically, the training time of TransMamba is a quadratic function of the TransPoint. In Section 3.3.1, our experiments confirm that the training efficiency of TransMamba indeed shows a quadratic function trend as TransPoint changes, and the optimal efficient point of our TransPoint PP is nearly 2,0482,048 for our setting (N=1,536N=1,536 and T=8,192T=8,192).
items.zh: 理论上，TransMamba的训练时间是TransPoint的二次函数。在第3.3.1节中，我们的实验证实TransMamba的训练效率确实随TransPoint变化呈二次函数趋势，并且对于我们的设置（N=1,536，T=8,192），最优效率点P接近2,048。

items.en: TransPoint schedule from layer aspect. We find that simply setting a global Transpoint for all layers (e.g., simultaneously at length 4,096) will result in unsatisfactory performance due to the sudden switching. To achieve better results, we need to set more diverse TransPoints at the layer level, which could gradually guide the model structure from pure Transformer to Mamba differently at various layers. To enable a smoother transformation, the TransPoints are placed separately but as close as possible to the optimal efficient PP according to Eq. 10. Specifically, our TransPoints cycle is performed every 8 layers, referring to the work (Dao & Gu, 2024) on hybrid structure. The mean of TransPoints is set slightly smaller than the optimal efficient point to enable more Mamba layers for better performance. TransPoints gradually transition from the beginning to the end of the sequence in a logarithmic trend (i.e., 0, 128, 256, 512, 1024, 2048, 4096, 8192), ensuring dispersion and smoothness.
items.zh: 从层角度的TransPoint调度。我们发现，简单地为所有层设置全局TransPoint（例如，同时在长度4,096处）会导致性能不佳，因为切换过于突然。为了获得更好的结果，我们需要在层级别设置更多样化的TransPoint，这可以逐步引导模型结构从纯Transformer到Mamba在不同层上有所不同。为了实现更平滑的转换，TransPoint被分开设置，但尽可能接近根据公式10得到的最优效率P。具体来说，我们的TransPoint循环每8层执行一次，参考了关于混合结构的工作（Dao & Gu, 2024）。TransPoint的均值设置略小于最优效率点，以允许更多Mamba层获得更好的性能。TransPoint以对数趋势（即0, 128, 256, 512, 1024, 2048, 4096, 8192）从序列开头逐渐过渡到结尾，确保分散性和平滑性。

items.en: Considering the above two aspects, we set our final TransPoint schedule balancing both effectiveness and efficiency. Our TransMamba with flexible TransPoint scheduling could have more potential interesting features to be further explored in the future. More detailed settings, explorations, and results are in the Experiments and Appendix.
items.zh: 考虑到以上两个方面，我们设置了最终的TransPoint调度，平衡了效果和效率。我们的TransMamba具有灵活的TransPoint调度，未来可能具有更多潜在的有趣特性有待进一步探索。更详细的设置、探索和结果见实验和附录。

items.en: Intuitively, the inference of TransMamba could adopt the same TransPoint schedule as that in training. However, due the flexibility of TransMamba, we can also choose completely different TransPoints during inference. It provides us a whimsical but inspiring idea that we can train TransMamba with the most efficient structure, and choose a different structure that best suits the task during inference. In experiments, we will explore its potential.
items.zh: 直观上，TransMamba的推理可以采用与训练相同的TransPoint调度。然而，由于TransMamba的灵活性，我们也可以在推理时选择完全不同的TransPoint。这为我们提供了一个异想天开但富有启发性的想法：我们可以用最高效的结构训练TransMamba，并在推理时选择最适合任务的不同结构。在实验中，我们将探索其潜力。

items.en: We developed three baseline model families with various sizes (400M, 1.5B): Transformer (Shoeybi et al., 2019), Mamba2 (Dao & Gu, 2024), and Hybrid (Lieber et al., 2024). All models are developed based on the Megatron-LM library. Specifically, all models are unified in model size for fair comparisons. The models are pre-trained utilizing collected in-house dataset which consists of a cleaned combination of Chinese and English datasets. We trained all models on 83 billion tokens for all models. For evaluation, we aim to achieve robust conclusions across diverse domains. We conducted comprehensive evaluations involving 8 English tasks, including ARC-E, ARC-C (Clark et al., 2018), CoQA (Reddy et al., 2019), OBQA (Mihaylov et al., 2018), PIQA (Bisk et al., 2020), PhoneBook (Waleffe et al., 2024), BoolQ (Clark et al., 2019), LongBench-v2 (Bai et al., 2024). More details are shown in Appendix A.3.1 and A.3.2.
items.zh: 我们开发了三种不同规模（400M、1.5B）的基线模型系列：Transformer（Shoeybi等人，2019）、Mamba2（Dao & Gu，2024）和Hybrid（Lieber等人，2024）。所有模型均基于Megatron-LM库开发。具体来说，所有模型在模型大小上统一以便公平比较。模型使用收集的内部数据集进行预训练，该数据集由清洗后的中英文数据集组合而成。我们在所有模型上训练了830亿个token。在评估方面，我们旨在跨不同领域获得稳健的结论。我们进行了全面评估，涉及8个英文任务，包括ARC-E、ARC-C（Clark等人，2018）、CoQA（Reddy等人，2019）、OBQA（Mihaylov等人，2018）、PIQA（Bisk等人，2020）、PhoneBook（Waleffe等人，2024）、BoolQ（Clark等人，2019）、LongBench-v2（Bai等人，2024）。更多细节见附录A.3.1和A.3.2。

items.en: We evaluate the baselines and TransMamba on multiple tasks including question answering and reading comprehension as shown in Table 3 (note that the input contexts of these tasks are longer enough than some of our TransPoints to trigger TransMamba). TransMamba achieves the overall best performance. On the question answering and understanding tasks, TransMamba achieves the best performance or is comparable to the Hybrid model, while it consistently outperforms the original Transformer and Mamba2. The PhoneBook task is given the contact information of multiple people and requires the model to accurately answer the contact of a specific person. As introduced in Work (Waleffe et al., 2024), Mamba has a significant disadvantage compared to Transformer in this precise search task, and this disadvantage also brings to the Hybrid model. However, due to our smart combination of Transformer-Mamba at the sequence level, TransMamba can give accurate answers at the beginning of the sequence with almost the same accuracy as Transformer.
items.zh: 我们在多个任务上评估了基线和TransMamba，包括问答和阅读理解，如表3所示（注意这些任务的输入上下文长度足够长，超过我们的一些TransPoint，以触发TransMamba）。TransMamba取得了整体最佳性能。在问答和理解任务上，TransMamba取得了最佳性能或与Hybrid模型相当，同时始终优于原始Transformer和Mamba2。PhoneBook任务给出了多个人的联系信息，要求模型准确回答特定人的联系方式。如工作（Waleffe等人，2024）所述，Mamba在此精确搜索任务中相比Transformer有显著劣势，这种劣势也传递给了Hybrid模型。然而，由于我们在序列级别上智能地组合了Transformer-Mamba，TransMamba可以在序列开头以几乎与Transformer相同的准确率给出准确答案。

items.en: As described in Table 2 and Section 2.1.2, Transformer and Mamba have efficiency advantages on short and long text, respectively. Our TransMamba is more efficient compared to baselines. Specifically, taking sequence length T=8k and state dimension N=4k as an example, the theoretical FLOPs of Transformer is 2.29 times that of the optimal TransMamba, while that of Mamba is 1.14 times. We conducted experiments on the average training time of the baselines and TransMamba on 3 machines in Table 5. TransMamba has a maximum efficiency improvement of 25% compared to Transformer, which will increase to 0.8% if we utilize the optimal efficient TransPoint Schedule. This efficiency improvement is consistent with the relative size of the theoretical FLOPs value. It is worth noting that because attention and SSM have their own engineering acceleration, the actual runtime improvement result does not fully reach the theoretical speedup limit. Optimization of TransMamba acceleration engineering is our future work, and there is still potential for speed improvement.
items.zh: 如表2和第2.1.2节所述，Transformer和Mamba分别在短文本和长文本上具有效率优势。我们的TransMamba相比基线更高效。具体来说，以序列长度T=8k和状态维度N=4k为例，Transformer的理论FLOPs是最优TransMamba的2.29倍，而Mamba是1.14倍。我们在表5中进行了基线和TransMamba在3台机器上的平均训练时间实验。TransMamba相比Transformer最大效率提升25%，如果使用最优效率的TransPoint调度，效率提升将增加到0.8%。这一效率提升与理论FLOPs值的相对大小一致。值得注意的是，由于注意力机制和SSM各自有工程加速，实际运行时间改进结果并未完全达到理论加速极限。TransMamba加速工程的优化是我们未来的工作，速度提升仍有潜力。

full.sec: 3.3 In-depth Analyses on Different TransPoint Schedule

items.en: TransPoint scheduling has a significant impact on the effectiveness and efficiency. We first conducted experiments on Layer-shared TransPoint scheduling for a straightforward understanding, where the TransPoint of all layers is set to one unified value. We experimented with the training efficiency of the TransPoint setting from 0 to 8192 in step size of 64. As shown in Figure 4 (a), the relative training time shows a quadratic curve trend, and the optimal TransPoint is around 2,0482,048. V1 ∼\sim V3 in Table 6 shows different Layer-shared schedules at various positions, whose loss and PPL are not satisfactory due to the sudden mutation from Transformer to Mamba for all layers. Hence, we move to explore Layer-specific TransPoint scheduling for better performance.
items.zh: TransPoint调度对效果和效率有显著影响。我们首先在层共享TransPoint调度上进行了实验以直观理解，其中所有层的TransPoint设置为一个统一值。我们实验了TransPoint从0到8192、步长为64的设置下的训练效率。如图4(a)所示，相对训练时间呈二次曲线趋势，最优TransPoint约为2,048。表6中的V1∼V3显示了不同位置的各种层共享调度，由于所有层从Transformer到Mamba的突变，其损失和PPL不理想。因此，我们转向探索层特定TransPoint调度以获得更好的性能。

items.en: During explorations on Layer-specific scheduling, we observed that three characteristics can bring better results: Layer-specific, Broad-range, and Fine-grained, and conduct three groups of evaluations (V4 ∼\sim V9 in Table 6). For example, the schedule of V4 indicates that its TransPoints cycle every 3 layers, and the TransPoints of layer 1-6 are: [3072, 4096, 5120, 3072, 4096, 5120…]. Note that these Layer-specific schedules also possess the same quadratic curve trend on efficiency as shown in Figure 4 (b). We condensed the following rules for TransPoints scheduling, and the final schedule is based on both effectiveness and efficiency. (a) The TransPoints of each layer should be layer-specific. Setting concentrated TransPoints for all layers has relatively poor validation results. V4 ∼\sim V6 set TransPoints at three positions and achieve better loss and PPL compared to V1 ∼\sim V3 with shared TransPoints. (b) The scheduling of TransPoints should cover broad-range of the sequence. V4 ∼\sim V6 have TransPoints of all layers under the concentrated setting vary within the range of 2k tokens, while the verification loss and PPL are significantly higher compared to V7 and V8. More diverse TransPoint help the model performance gradually improve. (c) Fine-grained transformation of TransPoints improves the performance. Compared to the vanilla broad range setting V7 and V8, V9 (i.e., the final TransMamba setting) have finer-grained and smoother scheduling cycling every 8 layers, achieving the best result.
items.zh: 在对逐层调度进行探索时，我们观察到三个特征可以带来更好的结果：逐层、广范围和细粒度，并进行了三组评估（表6中的V4∼V9）。例如，V4的调度表明其TransPoints每3层循环一次，第1-6层的TransPoints为：[3072, 4096, 5120, 3072, 4096, 5120…]。注意，这些逐层调度在效率上也具有如图4(b)所示的相同二次曲线趋势。我们总结了以下TransPoints调度规则，最终调度基于有效性和效率。(a) 每层的TransPoints应是逐层的。为所有层设置集中的TransPoints验证结果相对较差。V4∼V6在三个位置设置TransPoints，与共享TransPoints的V1∼V3相比，实现了更好的损失和PPL。(b) TransPoints的调度应覆盖序列的广范围。V4∼V6在集中设置下所有层的TransPoints在2k个token范围内变化，而验证损失和PPL显著高于V7和V8。更多样化的TransPoint有助于模型性能逐步提升。(c) TransPoints的细粒度变换提高了性能。与原始的广范围设置V7和V8相比，V9（即最终的TransMamba设置）具有更细粒度且更平滑的调度，每8层循环一次，取得了最佳结果。

full.sec: 3.4 Explorations on Inconsistent Training/Inference TransPoint Scheduling
full.secZh: 3.4 训练/推理不一致TransPoint调度的探索

items.en: Due to the flexibility of the Transformer and Mamba mode transformation based on the unified parameters in TransMamba, we can set completely different TransPoint schedules for training and inference. For this bold exploration, we train our TransMamba with the selected schedule V9, and then inference with different schedules. We surprisingly find that some inconsistent training/inference settings (e.g., inference with Transformer) could not only function normally, but also achieve even better results on certain tasks. We present these charming results in the Appendix A.4.1, which is a promising research direction.
items.zh: 由于基于TransMamba中统一参数的Transformer和Mamba模式转换的灵活性，我们可以为训练和推理设置完全不同的TransPoint调度。对于这一大胆的探索，我们使用选定的调度V9训练TransMamba，然后使用不同的调度进行推理。我们惊讶地发现，一些不一致的训练/推理设置（例如，使用Transformer进行推理）不仅能正常运行，而且在某些任务上取得了更好的结果。我们在附录A.4.1中展示了这些迷人的结果，这是一个有前景的研究方向。

full.sec: 3.5 Ablation Study on Other Model Components
full.secZh: 3.5 其他模型组件的消融研究

items.en: We conduct experiments on the components of the details of TransMamba framework. We found it beneficial to radiate the key components of Mamba onto the overall structure of TransMamba. The experimental results and details are shown in Appendix A.4.2.
items.zh: 我们对TransMamba框架的组件细节进行了实验。我们发现将Mamba的关键组件辐射到TransMamba的整体结构中是有益的。实验结果和细节见附录A.4.2。

items.en: Transformer has always been the focus of language model research (Beltagy et al., 2020; Liu et al., 2021; Tang et al., 2024), but its limitations in processing long sequences (Zhou et al., 2021; Behrouz et al., 2024) and the memory pressure caused by KV cache (Wang et al., 2020; Dao et al., 2022) are also difficult to solve. Mamba has the advantage of linear complexity based on the state space model (Gu & Dao, 2023; Zhang et al., 2024), but struggles in modeling complex contexts (Xiao et al., 2024).
items.zh: Transformer一直是语言模型研究的焦点（Beltagy等人，2020；Liu等人，2021；Tang等人，2024），但其在处理长序列方面的局限性（Zhou等人，2021；Behrouz等人，2024）以及KV缓存带来的内存压力（Wang等人，2020；Dao等人，2022）也难以解决。Mamba具有基于状态空间模型的线性复杂度优势（Gu & Dao，2023；Zhang等人，2024），但在建模复杂上下文方面存在困难（Xiao等人，2024）。

items.en: Hybrid models (Chen et al., 2024; Lou et al., 2024; Ren et al., 2025) that combine the two are emerging, but most of the work simply cascades them (Hatamizadeh & Kautz, 2024; Lieber et al., 2024). Recent work (Dao & Gu, 2024; Han et al., 2024; Wang et al., 2024) has revealed the consistency of the underlying mathematics between them. However, there is no work that truly attempts to unify Transformer and Mamba in sequence level.
items.zh: 结合两者的混合模型（Chen等人，2024；Lou等人，2024；Ren等人，2025）正在兴起，但大多数工作只是简单地将它们级联（Hatamizadeh & Kautz，2024；Lieber等人，2024）。最近的工作（Dao & Gu，2024；Han等人，2024；Wang等人，2024）揭示了它们之间底层数学的一致性。然而，还没有工作真正尝试在序列级别上统一Transformer和Mamba。

items.en: We proposes TransMamba to unify Transformer and Mamba at the sequence level and proves its superiority in efficiency and performance. Furthermore, we conduct a detailed exploration of TransPoints and summarize three criteria of TransPoint Scheduling. In short, our attempt provides insight and inspiration for the next generation of sequence modeling.
items.zh: 我们提出了TransMamba，在序列级别上统一Transformer和Mamba，并证明了其在效率和性能上的优越性。此外，我们对TransPoints进行了详细探索，并总结了TransPoint调度的三个准则。简而言之，我们的尝试为下一代序列建模提供了见解和启发。
